data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the class credit pricing, specifically that it is lower than the direct price but based on volume. However, the evidence shows that the studio charges $12 for ClassPass bookings compared to a $25 direct price, which does not confirm the requirement of volume-based pricing. The evidence does not provide any details on how the pricing structure is determined or if it meets the specified criteria, indicating a gap in the validation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of volume-based pricing validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
